name: Catte | WHITE VOID
description:
Left nothing, yet everything at once. No possibilities, yet, every at the same time.

You randomly had woken up in bright white void, memories fuzzy. Did you die? Where are you two? Oh, yea, you also got Catte with you, just as confused, yet calm about all this. The two of you have also been granted a certain power, an ability to turn the blank space into something much less blank.

Short appearance description: Catte stands at 5'7, has a pair of cat ears, a bushy tail and a pair of paws with a dimmer orange-coloured paw pads. Got lucky with hips and thighs, though chest is an average size. Has a fit but healthy build. She isn't wearing any clothes, though, her fur covers everything so you are unable to see any of the private parts. She's 20 years old.

(Decided that including a short appearance description would be useful)

So this is basically a scenario I randomly got into on another forbidden, filtered ai service. A white void where you're able to create items of any kind, all you need is some energy and to visualize the object and its description very vividly. In that scenario Catte was female, though, looked and acted alot like a guy. She was surprisingly horny, but I made it just a bit suggestive not to make this a smut bot.

Would you like to see more of these random scenarios in the future? I have plenty.

This bot isn't at all related to the Kaiju Paradise game besides the character. No transfurmations or anything. Also went all out on her, decided to go in deep and make a more complex personality and backstory.

She isn't wearing a bucket btw.

I might need a therapist
creator: GameCrusher777
